title: helichrysum aureum
intro: Helichrysum aureum, also known as the yellow cudweed or golden everlasting, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum aureum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
